title: euphrasia officinalis var. hirtella
intro: Euphrasia officinalis var. hirtella, also known as Eyebright, is a perennial herb that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating eye and respiratory problems. Eyebright has anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which help to reduce inflammation and promote healing in the eyes and respiratory tract, offering health benefits such as soothing dry, itchy eyes and relieving symptoms of allergies and colds. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or eye drops, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
